calendar.matters:
Petition For Orders Instructing Trustees (Probate Code Section 17200)
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bryan Kirk for Elizabeth Mackey and John Sutro, Jr.

Mr. Kirk stated that the Court has authority under Probate Code 17200 to impose restrictions and instruct the Trustee as to how to handle particular situations. The Court granted the Petition for Orders Instructing Trustees (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Orders Instructing Trustees (Probate Code Section 17200)
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
